criteria.evidence: Manual recipe and execution flow works, but primary UI exposes host/API details and duplicate validation/confirmation actions.
/api/matches exposes four deployed matches and UI shows perspective team, match count, periods, and possession.
Scope transitions clear dependent artifacts, but mode/query/preset changes can leave stale or contradictory interpretation context.
Live model-mode /api/interpret returned HTTP 500 for all tested prompts on 2026-06-22.
Approved block-shift recipe executed in cloud with 180 total results and cached follow-up.

Current deployed compiler does not prove ad hoc composition beyond recipe selection/corridor template; live model mode fails. Binary gate requires a Hermes-authored schema-valid plan structurally different from registered recipes/templates, at least two composable capabilities, temporal or relational logic, no code/prompt change, new plan hash, first-run MISS, and honest real-data execution.

criteria.criterion: plan provenance is explicit and truthful
criteria.evidence: The UI currently maps raw sources to friendly labels but does not expose the required source ontology: REVIEWED_RECIPE, MANUAL_PRESET, HERMES_RECIPE_SELECTION, HERMES_NOVEL_COMPOSITION, DETERMINISTIC_REPAIR, CAPABILITY_GAP.
Manual support ambiguity produces clarification; live Hermes mode currently 500.

criteria.criterion: unsupported request gives a capability gap
criteria.evidence: Optimality, communication, pressure, video/body orientation work; scanning/body angle can fall through in manual mode.
Cache HIT/MISS is honest but cold execution lacks elapsed time, selected-match search context, and cancel.
Run State shows HIT/MISS and stage list; API cache keys include scope, params, runtime version, and data hash.
Overlay proof text exists but no legend or tactical explanation; corridor line lacks open/close interval.
Match, period, canonical time, and result index are visible; tactical labels and measurements remain implementation-heavy.

criteria.criterion: Developer details are hidden by default
criteria.evidence: Raw JSON drawers are hidden, but API badges, busy key, known-timestamp form, evidence aliases, predicate ids, result ids, and replay ids remain visible.
Headless live page-load check captured no console errors; local Playwright proof also expects no console errors.
Manual approved and experimental flows are stable; Hermes model interpretation endpoint is not stable.

p0: Fix live Hermes model interpretation failure and convert invocation errors to MODEL_UNAVAILABLE instead of HTTP 500.
Prove or honestly remove the novel-composition claim from the emailable product journey.
Add explicit provenance labels so presets, reviewed recipes, Hermes recipe selection, Hermes novel composition, deterministic repair, and capability gaps cannot be confused.
Prevent unsupported football-language concepts from silently mapping to the selected preset.
Make mode/query/preset changes fail closed by clearing stale validation/execution/replay.
p1: Add replay overlay legend and temporal corridor validity.
Simplify primary action sequence and move implementation details out of default view.
